Note: The detailed 2025 stress test results and the hypothetical 2025 stress test results under the proposed models include 30 firms that participated in the 2024 stress test and are expected to participate in the 2026 stress test. The aggregate detailed results using the 2025 stress test models include the full phase-in of model changes for the 2025 stress test. Additionally, some rows in the detailed 2025 stress test results are different from the detailed hypothetical 2025 stress test results under the proposed models to demonstrate the impact of the proposed model changes.
